scripts.build: bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npx nuxt build'
scripts.dev: bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npx nuxt dev'
scripts.generate: bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npx nuxt generate'
scripts.preview: bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npx nuxt preview'
